name: The Sri Devikarumari Amman Dharma Sanstha
address: Vishnu Garden, Tilak Nagar Road, West Delhi.

sevas.name: morning pooja
sevas.desc: Morning pooja (Nitya Puja) is a daily Hindu ritual performed after bathing to invoke divine blessings, starting the day with peace and focus

sevas.name: Evening pooja
sevas.desc: Preparation: Bathe and wear clean, preferably cotton, clothes. Prepare the altar by cleaning it and arranging the murti or image
